summary: Comprehensive testing of BlackieFi 3.0 new features: Bill Pay Scheduling and Advanced Role Permission Editing. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.

issues: Minor React console warning about span inside option - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Server.py lint check passed - no lint errors found
Bill Pay APIs properly handle entity_id context and permissions
Roles APIs correctly prevent deletion of default roles
seed_data_creation: Test schedules created and cleaned up during testing. Existing Electric Bill schedule present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bill Pay Scheduling and Roles features fully tested. Backend: 8 bill pay endpoints (list, create, update, delete, toggle, pay-now, process-due, history) and 5 roles endpoints (list, create, update permissions, delete, cannot delete default). Frontend: Bill Pay page with schedules list, stats grid, tabs (Schedules/History), form for create/edit. Settings > Roles tab with permission groups, toggle switches, create/delete custom roles.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/billpay/schedules - 200 creates new schedule with next_payment_date
GET /api/billpay/history - 200 returns bill pay transaction history
bill_pay_scheduling.frontend_page: BillPayPage.jsx - Stats grid (active, due, monthly total), tabs (Schedules/History), schedule cards with action buttons (pay now, toggle, edit, delete), create/edit form

backend_endpoints: GET /api/roles/ - 200 lists all roles including custom
POST /api/roles/ - 200 creates custom role with permissions
DELETE /api/roles/{id} - 200 deletes custom role (400 for default roles)
roles_permissions.frontend_page: SettingsPage.jsx > RolesTab - Permission groups (Financial, Budgets & Savings, Investments, Administration, Other), toggle switches per permission, create/delete custom roles

server_lint.details: ruff lint check on /app/backend/server.py returned 'All checks passed!'

existing_features_working: Navigation to Bill Pay page via sidebar - working
